goal: Add a side-effect-free audit receipt record preflight builder for cockpit patch consume execution receipt record audit receipt artifacts without writing receipts, persisting audits, applying patches, mutating server/routes, or consuming permits.
scope_out: Do not write receipts or audits, perform durable writes, consume permits, apply patches, mutate server files, mutate route files, call providers, call DB, call GitHub, change package files, workflows, deployment files, or write runtime artifacts.
claims: Cockpit patch audit receipt artifacts can be preflighted for later record authority without recording them durably.
Audit receipt record ref, recorder ref, and policy ref are required.
Audit writes, durable persistence, patch application, server mutation, route mutation, permit consumption, and executable actions remain false.
assumptions: Audit receipt record authority and durable persistence require later task locks.
dod: Ready, missing record ref, and blocked audit receipt cases are tested.
Focused test, typecheck, task-lock verify, diff-check, and full builder tests pass.
stop_conditions: Receipt write, audit persistence, durable write, permit consumption, patch application, server mutation, route mutation, external calls, DB, GitHub, package, workflow, deployment, or runtime write changes become necessary.
prior_task_findings: BPK-179 produced a side-effect-free in-memory cockpit audit receipt artifact.
